name: VORNADO REALTY TRUST
business: Vornado is a fully integrated REIT that owns and operates office and retail properties with a concentration in the New York metropolitan area. It also has a 32.4% interest in Alexander's, Inc. and engages in property development and redevelopment.

exposures.sentence: 1,331 units in two Manhattan residential properties
We prioritize addressing climate change and in 2019 adopted a 10-year plan to make our buildings carbon neutral by 2030 ( Vision 2030 ).
increasing competition from online retailers and other retail centers, and the impact of technological change upon the retail environment generally.
The increased use of artificial intelligence ( AI ) could result in changes in tenant space utilization, including the need to reduce or reconfigure space.

catalysts.event: Decision on entering 350 Park JV or putting site
catalysts.sentence: The Vornado/Rudin JV has until July 2026 to determine whether to enter into the 350 Park JV with KG or to exercise the option to put the 350 Park Site to KG for $1.2 billion
We expect to complete the redevelopment for delivery to tenants in 2027.

catalysts.event: Refinancing of unsecured revolving credit facility and term loan
catalysts.sentence: On January 7, 2026, we completed a refinancing of our $1,250,000 unsecured revolving credit facility ($720,420 drawn as of December 31, 2025) and our $800,000 unsecured term loan.

We have executed a term sheet with the lenders pursuant to which the lenders will forebear from exercising their remedies and will waive default interest until February 2027, subject to certain conditions.
